description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a dark wooden frame and an extended headboard that incorporates two attached nightstands on either side. The bed features a beige mattress with a geometric patterned comforter and several matching pillows arranged at the head. On the left nightstand, there is a white, dome-shaped lamp, while the right nightstand holds a few colorful books or magazines. The frame is sleek and low-profile, with the headboard and nightstands forming a continuous horizontal line. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functionality and integrated storage surfaces.
description: A modern platform bed with an extended headboard, attached nightstands, a patterned comforter, pillows, a lamp, and books, all in a sleek, minimalist style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bed's thickness, the left nightstand with a lamp, and the arrangement of pillows and bedding.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the headboard, both nightstands, the lamp on the left, and books on the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the right nightstand with books, the lamp on the far side, and the bed's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard and nightstands, with the mattress and bedding partially visible.
